sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if left frame was collected
after = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']

print("Player position:")
for n in after:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N', 'G']:
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\nCharcoal frames (c):")
for n in after:
    if n['color'] == 'c':
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\nAll nodes:")
for n in after:
    print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
